languages.text: "Однако ваша лояльность ко двору фон Валанциус дает доступ к получению этих знаний".

traits.locale_text: "Однако, ваша лояльность ко двору фон Валанциусов дает доступ к получению этих знаний".

languages.text: "However, your loyalty to the von Valancius court grants you access to acquire this knowledge."
languages.original_text: "Однако ваша лояльность ко двору фон Валанциус дает доступ к получению этих знаний".

traits.locale_text: "However, your loyalty to the von Valancius court grants you access to acquire this knowledge."
"However, your loyalty to the von Valancius court grants you access to acquire this knowledge."
"However, your loyalty to the von Valancius court grants you access to acquire this knowledge."

languages.text: “然而，你对冯·瓦兰修斯宫廷的忠诚，赋予了你获取此知识的权限。”
languages.original_text: "However, your loyalty to the von Valancius court grants you access to acquire this knowledge."

traits.locale_text: “然而，你对冯·瓦兰修斯宫廷的忠诚，赋予了你获取此知识的权限。”

languages.text: « Cependant, votre loyauté envers la cour des von Valancius vous permet d'acquérir ces connaissances. »
languages.original_text: "However, your loyalty to the von Valancius court grants you access to acquire this knowledge."

traits.locale_text: « Cependant, votre loyauté envers la cour des von Valancius vous permet d'acquérir ces connaissances. »

languages.text: "Ancak von Valancius sarayına olan sadakatiniz, bu bilgiye erişmenize olanak tanıyor."
languages.original_text: "However, your loyalty to the von Valancius court grants you access to acquire this knowledge."

traits.locale_text: "Ancak von Valancius sarayına olan sadakatiniz, bu bilgiye erişmenize olanak tanıyor."

languages.text: «Sin embargo, su lealtad a la corte von Valancius le otorga acceso a este conocimiento».
languages.original_text: "However, your loyalty to the von Valancius court grants you access to acquire this knowledge."

traits.locale_text: «Sin embargo, su lealtad a la corte von Valancius le otorga acceso a este conocimiento».

languages.text: "Allerdings gewährt Euch Eure Loyalität gegenüber Haus von Valancius Zugang zu diesem Wissen."
languages.original_text: "However, your loyalty to the von Valancius court grants you access to acquire this knowledge."

traits.locale_text: "Allerdings gewährt Euch Eure Loyalität gegenüber Haus von Valancius Zugang zu diesem Wissen."

languages.text: 「しかし、あなたはフォン・ヴァランシウス家の忠誠心によって、この知識を得る権利を得ています。」
languages.original_text: "However, your loyalty to the von Valancius court grants you access to acquire this knowledge."

traits.locale_text: 「しかし、あなたはフォン・ヴァランシウス家の忠誠心によって、この知識を得る権利を得ています。」
